description_long: This is a dark wooden shelving unit with a classic, slightly ornate design, featuring five open shelves and a wide, overhanging top. The front face is open, allowing easy access to the shelves, which are evenly spaced and supported by sturdy side panels. The sides and back are solid, with the back panel providing structural support and a clean, finished appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the piece a rich, natural look. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for displaying decorative items or additional storage. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, emphasizing its function as an open storage or display unit.
description: A dark wooden open shelving unit with five shelves and a wide, flat top, designed for storage or display. The piece features solid sides and back, with visible wood grain and a classic, sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing five open shelves and the wide, overhanging top, with all shelves clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat side panel and the depth of the shelves, with no openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid back panel with a consistent wood finish, no openings or shelves visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a solid, flat panel and no visible features.
